Title: Establishes a pilot overnight residential parking system in the village of Hempstead
Summary: Authorizes the village board of trustees of the village of Hempstead to provide for a pilot overnight residential parking permit system and fix and require the payment of fees applicable to parking within the area in which such parking system is in effect.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to establishing a pilot overnight residential parking system in the village of Hempstead; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
